creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
- Update port to version 0.7.1

- This PR is required for update to audio/mp3splt-gtk port, and optionally for
update to audio/mp3splt.

- Add pkg-plist.  Generated using genplist, with a few small modifications.

- The port actually requires GNU make in this version.

- Implement and handle NOPORTDOCS.

- Simplify MP3, OGG, and NLS options.

- Patch as in previous versions to get rid of issues when compiling audio/mp3splt port.

Fix: Apply the patch and build
How-To-Repeat: apply the patch and build
